primer:
## Quantitative toolkit
The quant grounding the risk measures rely on: the **Quantitative methods** deck (distributions, MLE, Monte-Carlo, EVT, GARCH), **Hypothesis testing** (visual two-bell framework: α/β tradeoff, power — used in VaR backtesting and model validation), **Derivatives pricing**, and **Portfolio & investment** — the maths and instruments behind VaR, XVA and capital.
